data.name: 5GDeployment Planner
data.description: Plans 5G network deployments by analyzing coverage requirements, site availability, backhaul connectivity, and equipment specifications to generate optimal site selection and configuration plans.
data.author: TelecommunicationsAI Labs

data.name: 911Dispatch Optimizer
data.description: Optimizes 911 dispatch operations by prioritizing calls based on severity, location proximity, and available units, reducing response times through intelligent unit assignment and real-time rerouting capabilities.
data.author: Public SafetyAI Labs

data.name: A/B Test Analyzer
data.description: Analyzes A/B test results with proper statistical methods, determining significance and recommending next actions.
data.author: TestSignal

data.name: ABTestAnalyzer Agent
data.description: Analyzes A/B test results with statistical rigor by calculating effect sizes, confidence intervals, and Bayesian posterior probabilities, recommending decisions with quantified uncertainty for product experimentation.
data.author: Data AnalyticsAI Labs
